title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity's Science Skills is an agentic workbench that orchestrates frontier models and integrates access to over 30 scientific databases including UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. It accelerates research workflows by coordinating models, literature, and data to move from hypothesis to wet-lab experiment design in minutes.
